description: Address v2 review feedback: add comment explaining BotpressLoader retention, fix mobile chat panel positioning overlap with ad-block toast.
steps: In app/layout.tsx, add a comment above BotpressLoader render explaining intentional retention: BotpressLoader activates when NEXT_PUBLIC_BOTPRESS_BOT_URL is set; FloatingChatWidget is the fallback.
In components/features/FloatingChatWidget.tsx, change max-sm:bottom-4 to max-sm:bottom-16 in the ChatPanel div className to avoid overlapping with SoftAdBlockMessage on mobile.
Run npm run build to verify no compilation errors.
acceptance_criteria: Comment explaining BotpressLoader retention is present in layout.tsx
Chat panel uses max-sm:bottom-16 instead of max-sm:bottom-4
npm run build passes without errors
verification: Run npm run build and confirm it passes
Grep layout.tsx for the BotpressLoader comment
findings: Both changes applied. Comment added above BotpressLoader in layout.tsx. Mobile panel bottom changed from bottom-4 to bottom-16 to avoid overlapping with SoftAdBlockMessage toast. Build passes cleanly.
